    • Package adrover.antiads.login

      • Class adrover.antiads.login.LoginPanel

        class LoginPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • CREDS_FILE
            Path CREDS_FILE
            File used to store saved credentials.
          • emailField
            JTextField emailField
            Email input field.
          • emailLabel
            JLabel emailLabel
            Label for the email field (icon-based).
          • loginButton
            JButton loginButton
            Button used to perform login.
          • mediaComponent
            adrover.mediacomponent.MediaComponent mediaComponent
            Media component used to perform API authentication.
          • parent
            Main parent
            Reference to the main application window.
          • passwordField
            JPasswordField passwordField
            Password input field.
          • passwordLabel
            JLabel passwordLabel
            Label for the password field (icon-based).
          • rememberCheck
            JCheckBox rememberCheck
            Checkbox to remember user credentials.
          • statusLabel
            JLabel statusLabel
            Label used to display status or error messages.
          • titleLabel
            JLabel titleLabel
            Title label of the login panel.
          • TOKEN_DIR
            Path TOKEN_DIR
            Directory used to store authentication data.
          • TOKEN_FILE
            Path TOKEN_FILE
            File used to store the authentication token.
